summary.zh-CN: 本版本新增聊天任务排队、内容预览和图片读取能力，并改进夜间主题、工作区浏览和多项稳定性问题。
summary.en-US: This release adds queued chat input, richer content previews, and image reading, with improvements to Night theme, workspace browsing, and stability.

body.zh-CN: Agent 运行中可以继续输入，当前任务结束后会按顺序发送。
body.en-US: You can queue another message while an agent run is active; queued drafts are sent in order after the current run completes.

body.zh-CN: `show_file`、`show_url` 和 `show_panel_app` 现在有更明确的展示入口。
body.en-US: `show_file`, `show_url`, and `show_panel_app` now provide clearer display entry points.

body.zh-CN: 本地 HTML 可以在右侧工作区里以渲染预览打开，脚本和相对资源更接近真实浏览器行为。
body.en-US: Local HTML can open as a rendered preview in the right workspace panel, with scripts and relative assets behaving closer to a normal browser.

body.zh-CN: 新增 `view_image` agent 工具，模型可以读取本地 PNG、JPEG、WebP 和 GIF 图片。
body.en-US: The new `view_image` agent tool lets models read local PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF files.

body.zh-CN: 长会话可以快速回到最新消息，已完成的推理和工具过程会折叠成摘要。
body.en-US: Long conversations can jump back to the latest message, and completed reasoning or tool-process content collapses behind a summary.

title.zh-CN: 浏览器式 URL 预览

body.zh-CN: `show_url` 会以浏览器式标签页打开，带地址、刷新和外部打开入口；同一个文件的源码预览和渲染预览也可以同时保留。
body.en-US: `show_url` opens in browser-like tabs with address, refresh, and external-open controls; source and rendered previews for the same file can stay open separately.

body.zh-CN: 文件预览支持语法高亮，面包屑可以直接浏览附近目录。
body.en-US: File previews now support syntax highlighting, and breadcrumbs can browse nearby folders directly.

body.zh-CN: 新增 Night theme，并改进 Markdown、状态区、错误提示、开关、附件 token、marketplace 详情和 session metadata 的深色可读性。
body.en-US: Night theme is now available, with readability improvements for Markdown, status surfaces, error notices, switches, attachment tokens, marketplace details, and session metadata.

body.zh-CN: SideDock、DocBrowser、自动收起 sidebar、compact tab 和 Slash 面板的交互细节更稳定一致。
body.en-US: SideDock, DocBrowser, auto-collapsing sidebar behavior, compact tabs, and Slash panel interactions are more stable and consistent.

body.zh-CN: 修复上传文件、上传图片或粘贴图片后，发送时附件丢失的问题。
body.en-US: Uploaded files, uploaded images, and pasted images are no longer dropped when sending a message.

body.zh-CN: 图片附件不再默认带 `detail: "auto"`，避免部分 OpenAI-compatible provider 拒绝请求。
body.en-US: Image attachments no longer send a default `detail: "auto"` value that some OpenAI-compatible providers reject.

body.zh-CN: 失败会话的错误信息会显示在聊天详情页，不只停留在会话列表。
body.en-US: Failed session previews now appear in the chat detail view, not only in the session list.

body.zh-CN: 工具调用中的取消信号会继续传递到 NCP/MCP 工具执行层。
body.en-US: Abort signals during tool calls now propagate to NCP/MCP tool execution.

body.zh-CN: 修正 session activity 预览中的误报失败状态，减少不必要的错误提示。
body.en-US: Session activity previews no longer show false failure states as easily.

body.zh-CN: 新配置下 learning loop 默认关闭；已经显式配置过的用户不受影响。
body.en-US: The learning loop is disabled by default for new configs. Existing explicit user settings are preserved.

body.zh-CN: NCP 事件增加标准 timing 和 message lifecycle 字段，过程耗时和完成状态更可追踪。
body.en-US: NCP events now include standard timing and message lifecycle fields, making process duration and completion state easier to track.

body.zh-CN: 这是 NPM stable minor 版本，可通过正常的 NextClaw NPM 安装或更新流程使用。
body.en-US: This is an NPM stable minor release available through the normal NextClaw NPM install or update flow.
